name: Truffle
story: Truffle's folded ears make her look permanently unimpressed, which makes her sudden zoomies even funnier. She saves them for exactly 10 p.m.
She likes heated floors, slow blinks, and sitting near — not on — her people. A dignified companion for a dignified home.

medical.notes: Fully vetted. Joints checked — healthy; we'll share fold-mix care notes at adoption.

photoAlt: Truffle, a grey Scottish fold mix with folded ears and amber eyes, lying on a mat
